test_cases.title: Todo batch add 3 items
test_cases.description: Verify texts: ['A', 'B', 'C'] creates 3 todos with consecutive IDs
steps: verify return text is summary format

test_cases.title: Todo batch add single item
test_cases.description: Verify texts: ['single'] works as single-add equivalent

test_cases.title: Todo batch add empty array rejected
test_cases.description: Verify texts: [] returns error

test_cases.title: Todo batch add whitespace-only item rejected
test_cases.description: Verify texts: ['  '] returns error after trim

test_cases.title: Todo batch delete 2 items
test_cases.description: Verify ids: [1, 3] deletes both items

test_cases.title: Todo batch delete non-existent ID rejected
test_cases.description: Verify ids: [99] returns error without partial deletion
steps: verify error returned and #1 still exists

test_cases.title: Todo batch delete duplicate IDs deduplicated
test_cases.description: Verify ids: [1, 1] deletes #1 once

test_cases.title: GoalTask initial status is pending
test_cases.description: Verify create_tasks sets status: 'pending'

test_cases.title: GoalTask normal flow: pending → in_progress → completed
test_cases.description: Verify normal lifecycle with evidence

test_cases.title: GoalTask cancel flow: pending → cancelled
test_cases.description: Verify cancellation from non-terminal state

test_cases.title: GoalTask completed cannot be changed
test_cases.description: Verify terminal state protection for completed

test_cases.title: GoalTask cancelled cannot be changed
test_cases.description: Verify terminal state protection for cancelled

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks batch 3 updates
test_cases.description: Verify 2 completed + 1 cancelled in single call

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks completed without evidence rejected
test_cases.description: Verify evidence required for completed status

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks non-existent taskId rejected
test_cases.description: Verify whole batch rejected if any taskId missing

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks empty array rejected
test_cases.description: Verify updates: [] returns error

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks duplicate taskId rejected
test_cases.description: Verify updates with same taskId twice returns error

test_cases.title: Goal update_tasks non-completed evidence silently ignored
test_cases.description: Verify evidence on in_progress status is ignored
steps: verify task is in_progress, evidence not set

test_cases.title: Goal complete_goal with cancelled tasks allowed
test_cases.description: Verify 6 completed + 2 cancelled → complete_goal succeeds

test_cases.title: Goal complete_goal with pending tasks rejected
test_cases.description: Verify 6 completed + 2 pending → complete_goal fails

test_cases.title: Goal complete_goal all cancelled rejected
test_cases.description: Verify all cancelled → complete_goal fails
steps: verify error about no completed tasks

test_cases.title: formatTaskList three groups rendering
test_cases.description: Verify output has completed, in_progress+pending, cancelled groups
steps: verify output contains ✓ group, ☐/● group, ✗ group

test_cases.title: renderCall batch display
test_cases.description: Verify renderCall shows (N items) for add and (N updates) for update_tasks
steps: verify renderCall for add with texts: ['a','b'] shows (2 items)
verify renderCall for update_tasks with 3 updates shows (3 updates)

test_cases.title: TypeScript type check passes
test_cases.description: Verify npx tsc --noEmit has zero errors

test_cases.title: ESLint passes
test_cases.description: Verify npm run lint has zero errors
